---
title: "Air Pollution & Ecobici in Mexico City"
jupyter: python3
---

## About this project

This is an end-to-end case study exploring the relationship between
air pollution and Ecobici bike-share usage in Mexico City, using only
public data.

The project demonstrates a full data pipeline: extraction, data quality
checks, exploratory analysis, methodological context, modeling, and
publication.

## First look at the data

```{python}
#| echo: false
import duckdb

csv_path = "data/air_quality/rama_2023_05.csv"
con = duckdb.connect()

avg_pm25 = con.sql(f"""
    SELECT ROUND(AVG(PM25), 2) AS avg_pm25
    FROM read_csv('{csv_path}')
""").fetchone()[0]

n_days = con.sql(f"""
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM read_csv('{csv_path}')
""").fetchone()[0]
```

Across `{python} n_days` days of daily readings (2015–2023), the average
PM2.5 concentration for Mexico City was `{python} avg_pm25` µg/m³.
